name: Security - Content Safety Guardrails on Analyze Endpoint
description: Validates that the /analyze endpoint applies content safety guardrails to the LLM output using the GUARDRAILS_CONFIG.
input: POST request to /analyze endpoint with query that could trigger content safety checks (e.g., containing credentials or toxic content)
output: AnalyzeResponse with sanitized result or error if content safety threshold exceeded
success_criteria: Content safety decorator is invoked (can be checked via logs or mock)
Result is sanitized according to GUARDRAILS_CONFIG (e.g., credentials not present if check_credentials_output=True)
error_scenarios: Content safety check fails or blocks response
